title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 23 2022
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 23 2022
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 23 2022
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 23/02/2022
DCE iron ore fluctuated to the upside in the morning and retreated in the afternoon. an decrease of 0.78%throughout the day; The quotation in the morning steady decline over yesterday. Market wait-and-see sentiment increased, and port spot turnover continues low.
